claim: Open WebUI provides ChatGPT-like interface for n8n agents; enables voice chat, conversation history, and markdown formatting
actionable: Replace n8n's built-in chat trigger with Open WebUI integration for production agent interfaces; supports voice, history, and rich formatting.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES

claim: n8n's native chat trigger UI is limited: no customization, no conversation history, no voice—Open WebUI solves all three via function integration
actionable: Don't rely on n8n's chat UI for production; integrate Open WebUI via functions feature for professional interface with history and voice support.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES

claim: Open WebUI functions enable custom Python integration: define LLM behavior without modifying Open WebUI source; REST API calls to external agents
actionable: Write Open WebUI function to POST requests to n8n webhook; function parses responses, handles authentication, formats output for UI.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES

claim: n8n webhook trigger exposes public URL for agents; use header authentication (bearer token) to protect endpoints from unauthorized calls
actionable: Enable header authentication on n8n webhooks; pass bearer token from Open WebUI function to prevent credential theft and API abuse.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES

claim: n8n agents in Open WebUI call LLM twice per first message: once for response, once for title generation, once for tag generation—manage cost via cheap LLM for metadata
actionable: Use fast/cheap LLM (GPT-4 Mini) for metadata generation in n8n; reserve expensive models (Claude 3.7 Sonnet) for main agent only.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES

claim: n8n session ID routing: check if session_id is none to separate metadata generation from main agent conversation; enables parallel LLM calling
actionable: In n8n workflows, route based on session_id: if none, generate title/tags with cheap LLM; otherwise run main agent conversation.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES

claim: Open WebUI + n8n enables voice agents: voice input → Open WebUI function → n8n agent → voice output via TTS integration
actionable: Build voice-enabled agents by combining Open WebUI voice tools with n8n agent logic; enables conversational interfaces without code.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES

claim: Local AI Package bundles n8n, Open WebUI, Ollama, and database for self-hosted AI stack; enables fully offline multi-tool agent deployment
actionable: Use Local AI Package for rapid self-hosted deployment; includes pre-configured n8n, Open WebUI, Ollama, and PostgreSQL.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES

claim: Installation options for Open WebUI: Python (pip install + serve), Docker (single command), or Local AI Package (all-in-one)
actionable: Choose Open WebUI installation: Python for simple setup, Docker for portability, Local AI Package for complete stack with n8n.
source_title: Build a ChatGPT Style App for Your n8n AI Agents in MINUTES
